channel.title: Underrated on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Underrated on Tech Tracker

item.title: The best and underrated audio editor app for professionals.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-A_Vyr_dh5IE/YhEf9230JcI/AAAAAAAAJQM/Nlc-ZGIvpcQFldULlAxVBKo8Wv-cuJVawCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1645289460528874-0.png" alt=""> Do you edit films or music then you must have an proffesional audio editor software to full-fill your requirements, most people who have PC use advanced audio editing softwares like Audicity, while smartphone users heavily depended on Wavstudio app to edit and convert audio files using studio level features used by proffesionals. But, Wavstudio™ has advanced features which are usually not required by newbies including that in order to use certain app features of Wavstudio™ you have to buy and upgrade to pro which costs money, this is why people searching for an best alternative to Wavstudio™ app which has all features that are normally required by newbies and proffesionals for advanced audio editing available for free.

item.title: Clite HD - The underrated video conferencing app for android !
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-3EjpL822zmQ/X5xMtXGcXcI/AAAAAAAACCI/GXhQv-Xa_S856EkJlmk5SKgOolJWAQ7SwCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1604078764643772-0.png" alt=""> In time of covid 19 pandemic digital usage rising like never before to teach, interact, meet, educate, verifying documents etc all are done using video calling or conferencing. Video calling apps getting millions of downloads from past 1 year and continously increasing the usage statistics. In the category of communication video calling is more preffered way to connect to people in this time now a days google meet & zoom are the most used and preffered video calling apps.
